visual_description:
A medium close-up shot from the passenger side shows two men sitting in the front of a car at night. The man in the driver's seat, on the left, has a weathered face and looks down with a somber expression. The younger man in the passenger seat, on the right, looks forward with a concerned and attentive gaze. The car's interior is dark, illuminated by a soft light from outside, with the blurry lights of the city visible through the windshield. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a man speaking in a calm, conversational tone, as if making an observation. He says, "跟着你，你明星啊" (Following you, you're a celebrity, huh?). His voice is steady and even. In the background, a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score plays, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and tie. He is standing in what appears to be an office or a police station, looking down at a small bottle of dark liquid he holds in his hand. To his left, a large board covered in black-and-white photographs is visible. The "风行网
